headline: Is Paycom Software (PAYC) Now Attractive After A 44% One Year Share Price Slump?
summary: For investors wondering whether Paycom Software is attractively priced or still a value trap after a rough run, this article walks through what the numbers are actually saying about the stock today. At the last close of US$138.43, the stock has moved 9.2% over the past week and 11.4% over the past month, while the year-to-date return sits at a 9.2% decline and the 1-year return at a 44.0% decline. Over longer periods, the 3- and 5-year returns stand at 46.6% and 54.2% declines...
